TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Pacaycu, title = Pacaycu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pacaycu} }

S.FORM: == Pacaycu Ś∑īŚģįśóŹ == Pacay-cu " Pazeh" singangan naca tu Pace-haycu atu Paycay-haycu, cenday nipangangan u "Sanmaw-hun", u Taywan Tangabulan nu Yuncumin. mueneng i enalan nu Taycun, micidek ku i Anli bansia ku satabakiay. Cence a zidayan layak misatadas tu Cuo Taywa sa, Pacay-cu pacicien mabulaw taydan i Miwli sanyi Liyi-tan nu liwliwan atu Nantuo Puli Aaylan niyadu'an, Puli katukuh ayda mahini henay ku kamu nu Pacay-yi atu lalangawan. Ś∑īŚģįśóŹ(Ś∑īŚģįŤ™ě:Pazeh) . malawpestu ku kamu nu Pacay-yi Ť™ěŤ®ÄÁÄēŚćĪ Ś∑īŚģįŤ™ě Pacay-yi misuayaw tu sakalawpesan a kamuan, sadikuday musakamuay tu kamu nu Pacay-yi a tademaw itini i tusep-caysep a mihcaan, nina mabelecay a tademaw ci Pan-cin-yi tatayna, hatidaay tu nu Pacay-cuzen mala layak tu namin, casiw-caysiw a mihcaan ni lecuhan, yu maudip henay napalekal tu " pacay-yi" a kamuan. Tusep-sepcay a mihcaan namipadang ci Pan-cin-yi tu mikinkiway tu cudadan ci Li-zen-kuy yunse tu kamuan, atu Dipun seace ci Seten-ce misulit tu " Pacay-yi zidin", atu niyadu'ay a tademaw ci Wanpan-mei-yi nisangaan nu udip tu adidiay nu zidin " Ama' Atu-nu a Pacayn nakamuan. ". tusep-caysep mihcaan lima a bulad Nantuo Pacay binacadan lalangawan seahuy lisecen ci Pan-wen-hui sakamusa, ayda nu pina a mihcaan nu Pacay-zen itini i nipipadang nu seahu, aydaay a wawa pasubabalaki sabaw tu pina ku matinengay musakamu tu Pacay-yi, cay tu kaw babalaki a cacay ku matinengay musakamu, sasa ayda inai'tu ku sayaway musakamuay nu tademaw. aydaay nu Nantuo Puli Aylan kiwkay tu payduyu nu sananal u kamu nu Pacay-yi ku kamu nida. 2010ŚĻī5 . kulitan ku bihid ÁīčťĚĘ CInday Cunhua cecum idaw kunipikilukan tu " anli, sawci, wuninlan, alisi, pucay-li tatayna kuliten ku bilbil, adidi' ku nipitulecekan, mahida u Luohan-cetuo, bangcal masasuayaw, i udip aca nu dumaan kuyda" nipicuduh misausi mahida unipikulit nu taluku a lalangawan. adihan nu mita, Keha wucu ŚŹÉŤ¶č:Śô∂ŚďąŚ∑ęśóŹ Pacay binacadan u Taywan tangbulan nu Yencumin, satabakiay nu picidekan nu waywayan han anu masakapah tu kunuheni mitalakw tu Taywan Nandaw a Yencimin, makaala tu cacay a lasubuan a kunhu. Pacay a binacadan idaw henay kunika kenihan tu Pacay-cu " Pazih" atu Keha-wucu " Kaxabu". u niyadu' ku han, Hunyun nutipan u Pacay binacadan, waliyan Wuse u Keha-wu binacadan. " puce-li bansia u Keha-wucu". Pacay-cu-zen mabulaw taydan i Puli, mueneng i Wuniw-lan masaenalay a kitidaan" Aylan kitidaan" u Pacay binacadan, mueneng i Mesi sawacan nu lilisa a Mesi-secun "Niwmin-san, Suocen-hu', Tanan, Wukun-lun" u Keha-wucu. ,ÁīĄŚú®170cm (Pazih)šĽ•ŚŹäŚô∂ŚďąŚ∑ęśóŹ(Kaxabu). . malecad kina kamu nuheni atu masasengi ku lalangawan, sakamusa ku Yinen-ciaci anikenihan u sakalecad nu binacadan sa. mangalay mikaykic tina Keha-wucu atu Pacay-cu a ngangan, ci Lay-kun-yi buksi mangalay tu Abuan "Abuan" , nina ngangan sapalecaden kina tusaay a binacadan. sadikuday matinengay musakamu tu Pacay-yi a tademaw i tusep-caysep nina mabelecay a Aylan niyaduan ci Pan-cin-yi babalaki, Miesi-secun nina mabelecay ci Pan-cun-nay babalaki a iluc ci Pan-eun-li babalaki atu duma a Keha-wu cenlaw matineng musakamu tu Keha-wuyi, matineng henay mudadiw tu naayaway a Keha-wu a dadadiwan " Yicu-ceke" "ayan, ayin". Abuan "(ayanÔľõśĄõÁÖô). Keha-wucu itini i Puli ngangan han u " Mei-se-secun-hun" tawyaay a tademaw miduduc tu nadipaan nu babalaki a kawawan. Dipun a zitayan u Yi-yun-cen namin, masasuada tu biyaway a Tay-ya-cu masasudemec. sisa itini i Puli matenes kina kamuan tu " Secun u tada Hun sa". nina binacadan pisiwgacuan pangangan han tu " Huana pisiwgcuan" atu "singanganan tu Pan a nipisiwgacu han" kaliwmaah nu kuyumi tu sabaw cacay a bulad sabaw lima nu demiadan sikawaw. misanga tu dayday a kakanen " Alakuy", sikawaw tu " Centin " mahalit", " dakep tu tabakiay a buting", "cuepiw "maazazuah" tu daydayaca nu kawawan. "ťėŅśčČÁ≤Ņ",ŚŹäŤąČŤĺ¶"ÁČĹÁĒį"(mahalit),"śäďŚ§ßť≠ö","ŤĶįś®ô"(maazazuah)Á≠ČśóŹÁĺ§Śā≥ÁĶĪśīĽŚčē.
S.PHON: == pa ¶aj ¶u *** == pa ¶aj- ¶u " paz…ôńß" siŇčaŇčan na ¶a tu pa ¶…ô-ńßaj ¶u atu paj ¶aj-ńßaj ¶u, ¶…ôndaj nipaŇčaŇčan u "sanmaw-ńßun", u tajwan taŇčabur~…ĺan nu jun ¶umin. mu…ôn…ôŇč i …ônar~…ĺan nu taj ¶un, mi ¶id…ôk ku i anr~…ĺi bansia ku satabakiaj. ¶…ôn ¶…ô a zidajan r~…ĺajak misatadas tu ¶uo tajwa sa, pa ¶aj- ¶u pa ¶i ¶i…ôn mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i miwr~…ĺi sanji r~…ĺiji-tan nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwan atu nantuo pur~…ĺi aajr~…ĺan nijadu Ē~ °an, pur~…ĺi katukuńß ajda mańßini ńß…ônaj ku kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ***(***:paz…ôńß) . mar~…ĺawp…ôstu ku kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji **** *** pa ¶aj-ji misuajaw tu sakar~…ĺawp…ôsan a kamuan, sadikudaj musakamuaj tu kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji a tad…ômaw itini i tus…ôp- ¶ajs…ôp a mińß ¶aan, nina mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶i pan- ¶in-ji tatajna, ńßatidaaj tu nu pa ¶aj- ¶uz…ôn mar~…ĺa r~…ĺajak tu namin, ¶asiw- ¶ajsiw a mińß ¶aan ni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, ju maudip ńß…ônaj napar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu " pa ¶aj-ji" a kamuan. tus…ôp-s…ôp ¶aj a mińß ¶aan namipadaŇč ¶i pan- ¶in-ji tu mikinkiwaj tu ¶udadan ¶i r~…ĺi-z…ôn-kuj juns…ô tu kamuan, atu dipun s…ôa ¶…ô ¶i s…ôt…ôn- ¶…ô misur~…ĺit tu " pa ¶aj-ji zidin", atu nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw ¶i wanpan-m…ôi-ji nisaŇčaan nu udip tu adidiaj nu zidin " ama Ē~ ° atu-nu a pa ¶ajn nakamuan. ". tus…ôp- ¶ajs…ôp mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad nantuo pa ¶aj bina ¶adan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan s…ôańßuj r~…ĺis…ô ¶…ôn ¶i pan-w…ôn-ńßui sakamusa, ajda nu pina a mińß ¶aan nu pa ¶aj-z…ôn itini i nipipadaŇč nu s…ôańßu, ajdaaj a wawa pasubabar~…ĺaki sabaw tu pina ku matin…ôŇčaj musakamu tu pa ¶aj-ji, ¶aj tu kaw babar~…ĺaki a ¶a ¶aj ku matin…ôŇčaj musakamu, sasa ajda inai Ē~ °tu ku sajawaj musakamuaj nu tad…ômaw. ajdaaj nu nantuo pur~…ĺi ajr~…ĺan kiwkaj tu pajduju nu sananar~…ĺ u kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji ku kamu nida. ****** . kur~…ĺitan ku bińßid ** ¶indaj ¶unńßua ¶…ô ¶um idaw kunipikir~…ĺukan tu " anr~…ĺi, saw ¶i, wuninr~…ĺan, ar~…ĺisi, pu ¶aj-r~…ĺi tatajna kur~…ĺit…ôn ku bir~…ĺbir~…ĺ, adidi Ē~ ° ku nipitur~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôkan, mańßida u r~…ĺuońßan- ¶…ôtuo, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ masasuajaw, i udip a ¶a nu dumaan kujda" nipi ¶uduńß misausi mańßida unipikur~…ĺit nu tar~…ĺuku a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. adińßan nu mita, k…ôńßa wu ¶u **:**** pa ¶aj bina ¶adan u tajwan taŇčbur~…ĺan nu j…ôn ¶umin, satabakiaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan nu wajwajan ńßan anu masakapańß tu kunuńß…ôni mitar~…ĺakw tu tajwan nandaw a j…ôn ¶imin, makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubuan a kunńßu. pa ¶aj a bina ¶adan idaw ńß…ônaj kunika k…ônińßan tu pa ¶aj- ¶u " pazińß" atu k…ôńßa-wu ¶u " ka*abu". u nijadu Ē~ ° ku ńßan, ńßunjun nutipan u pa ¶aj bina ¶adan, war~…ĺijan wus…ô u k…ôńßa-wu bina ¶adan. " pu ¶…ô-r~…ĺi bansia u k…ôńßa-wu ¶u". pa ¶aj- ¶u-z…ôn mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i pur~…ĺi, mu…ôn…ôŇč i wuniw-r~…ĺan masa…ônar~…ĺaj a kitidaan" ajr~…ĺan kitidaan" u pa ¶aj bina ¶adan, mu…ôn…ôŇč i m…ôsi sawa ¶an nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisa a m…ôsi-s…ô ¶un "niwmin-san, suo ¶…ôn-ńßu Ē~ °, tanan, wukun-r~…ĺun" u k…ôńßa-wu ¶u. ,***** ¶m (pazińß)******(ka*abu). . mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kina kamu nuńß…ôni atu masas…ôŇči ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, sakamusa ku jin…ôn- ¶ia ¶i anik…ônińßan u sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu bina ¶adan sa. maŇčar~…ĺaj mikajki ¶ tina k…ôńßa-wu ¶u atu pa ¶aj- ¶u a ŇčaŇčan, ¶i r~…ĺaj-kun-ji buksi maŇčar~…ĺaj tu abuan "abuan" , nina ŇčaŇčan sapar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn kina tusaaj a bina ¶adan. sadikudaj matin…ôŇčaj musakamu tu pa ¶aj-ji a tad…ômaw i tus…ôp- ¶ajs…ôp nina mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj a ajr~…ĺan nijaduan ¶i pan- ¶in-ji babar~…ĺaki, mi…ôsi-s…ô ¶un nina mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj ¶i pan- ¶un-naj babar~…ĺaki a ir~…ĺu ¶ ¶i pan-…ôun-r~…ĺi babar~…ĺaki atu duma a k…ôńßa-wu ¶…ônr~…ĺaw matin…ôŇč musakamu tu k…ôńßa-wuji, matin…ôŇč ńß…ônaj mudadiw tu naajawaj a k…ôńßa-wu a dadadiwan " ji ¶u- ¶…ôk…ô" "ajan, ajin". abuan "(ajan***). k…ôńßa-wu ¶u itini i pur~…ĺi ŇčaŇčan ńßan u " m…ôi-s…ô-s…ô ¶un-ńßun" tawjaaj a tad…ômaw midudu ¶ tu nadipaan nu babar~…ĺaki a kawawan. dipun a zitajan u ji-jun- ¶…ôn namin, masasuada tu bijawaj a taj-ja- ¶u masasud…ôm…ô ¶. sisa itini i pur~…ĺi mat…ôn…ôs kina kamuan tu " s…ô ¶un u tada ńßun sa". nina bina ¶adan pisiwga ¶uan paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " ńßuana pisiwg ¶uan" atu "siŇčaŇčanan tu pan a nipisiwga ¶u ńßan" kar~…ĺiwmaańß nu kujumi tu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw r~…ĺima nu d…ômiadan sikawaw. misaŇča tu dajdaj a kakan…ôn " ar~…ĺakuj", sikawaw tu " ¶…ôntin " mańßar~…ĺit", " dak…ôp tu tabakiaj a butiŇč", " ¶u…ôpiw "maazazuańß" tu dajdaja ¶a nu kawawan. "***",***"**"(mańßar~…ĺit),"***","**"(maazazuańß)*******.
S.FORM: == Pacaycu Ś∑īŚģįśóŹ == Pacay-cu " Pazeh" singangan naca tu Pace-haycu atu Paycay-haycu, cenday nipangangan u "Sanmaw-hun", u Taywan Tangabulan nu Yuncumin. mueneng i enalan nu Taycun, micidek ku i Anli bansia ku satabakiay. Cence a zidayan layak misatadas tu Cuo Taywa sa, Pacay-cu pacicien mabulaw taydan i Miwli sanyi Liyi-tan nu liwliwan atu Nantuo Puli Aaylan niyadu'an, Puli katukuh ayda mahini henay ku kamu nu Pacay-yi atu lalangawan. Ś∑īŚģįśóŹ(Ś∑īŚģįŤ™ě:Pazeh) . malawpestu ku kamu nu Pacay-yi Ť™ěŤ®ÄÁÄēŚćĪ Ś∑īŚģįŤ™ě Pacay-yi misuayaw tu sakalawpesan a kamuan, sadikuday musakamuay tu kamu nu Pacay-yi a tademaw itini i tusep-caysep a mihcaan, nina mabelecay a tademaw ci Pan-cin-yi tatayna, hatidaay tu nu Pacay-cuzen mala layak tu namin, casiw-caysiw a mihcaan ni lecuhan, yu maudip henay napalekal tu " pacay-yi" a kamuan. Tusep-sepcay a mihcaan namipadang ci Pan-cin-yi tu mikinkiway tu cudadan ci Li-zen-kuy yunse tu kamuan, atu Dipun seace ci Seten-ce misulit tu " Pacay-yi zidin", atu niyadu'ay a tademaw ci Wanpan-mei-yi nisangaan nu udip tu adidiay nu zidin " Ama' Atu-nu a Pacayn nakamuan. ". tusep-caysep mihcaan lima a bulad Nantuo Pacay binacadan lalangawan seahuy lisecen ci Pan-wen-hui sakamusa, ayda nu pina a mihcaan nu Pacay-zen itini i nipipadang nu seahu, aydaay a wawa pasubabalaki sabaw tu pina ku matinengay musakamu tu Pacay-yi, cay tu kaw babalaki a cacay ku matinengay musakamu, sasa ayda inai'tu ku sayaway musakamuay nu tademaw. aydaay nu Nantuo Puli Aylan kiwkay tu payduyu nu sananal u kamu nu Pacay-yi ku kamu nida. 2010ŚĻī5 . kulitan ku bihid ÁīčťĚĘ CInday Cunhua cecum idaw kunipikilukan tu " anli, sawci, wuninlan, alisi, pucay-li tatayna kuliten ku bilbil, adidi' ku nipitulecekan, mahida u Luohan-cetuo, bangcal masasuayaw, i udip aca nu dumaan kuyda" nipicuduh misausi mahida unipikulit nu taluku a lalangawan. adihan nu mita, Keha wucu ŚŹÉŤ¶č:Śô∂ŚďąŚ∑ęśóŹ Pacay binacadan u Taywan tangbulan nu Yencumin, satabakiay nu picidekan nu waywayan han anu masakapah tu kunuheni mitalakw tu Taywan Nandaw a Yencimin, makaala tu cacay a lasubuan a kunhu. Pacay a binacadan idaw henay kunika kenihan tu Pacay-cu " Pazih" atu Keha-wucu " Kaxabu". u niyadu' ku han, Hunyun nutipan u Pacay binacadan, waliyan Wuse u Keha-wu binacadan. " puce-li bansia u Keha-wucu". Pacay-cu-zen mabulaw taydan i Puli, mueneng i Wuniw-lan masaenalay a kitidaan" Aylan kitidaan" u Pacay binacadan, mueneng i Mesi sawacan nu lilisa a Mesi-secun "Niwmin-san, Suocen-hu', Tanan, Wukun-lun" u Keha-wucu. ,ÁīĄŚú®170cm (Pazih)šĽ•ŚŹäŚô∂ŚďąŚ∑ęśóŹ(Kaxabu). . malecad kina kamu nuheni atu masasengi ku lalangawan, sakamusa ku Yinen-ciaci anikenihan u sakalecad nu binacadan sa. mangalay mikaykic tina Keha-wucu atu Pacay-cu a ngangan, ci Lay-kun-yi buksi mangalay tu Abuan "Abuan" , nina ngangan sapalecaden kina tusaay a binacadan. sadikuday matinengay musakamu tu Pacay-yi a tademaw i tusep-caysep nina mabelecay a Aylan niyaduan ci Pan-cin-yi babalaki, Miesi-secun nina mabelecay ci Pan-cun-nay babalaki a iluc ci Pan-eun-li babalaki atu duma a Keha-wu cenlaw matineng musakamu tu Keha-wuyi, matineng henay mudadiw tu naayaway a Keha-wu a dadadiwan " Yicu-ceke" "ayan, ayin". Abuan "(ayanÔľõśĄõÁÖô). Keha-wucu itini i Puli ngangan han u " Mei-se-secun-hun" tawyaay a tademaw miduduc tu nadipaan nu babalaki a kawawan. Dipun a zitayan u Yi-yun-cen namin, masasuada tu biyaway a Tay-ya-cu masasudemec. sisa itini i Puli matenes kina kamuan tu " Secun u tada Hun sa". nina binacadan pisiwgacuan pangangan han tu " Huana pisiwgcuan" atu "singanganan tu Pan a nipisiwgacu han" kaliwmaah nu kuyumi tu sabaw cacay a bulad sabaw lima nu demiadan sikawaw. misanga tu dayday a kakanen " Alakuy", sikawaw tu " Centin " mahalit", " dakep tu tabakiay a buting", "cuepiw "maazazuah" tu daydayaca nu kawawan. "ťėŅśčČÁ≤Ņ",ŚŹäŤąČŤĺ¶"ÁČĹÁĒį"(mahalit),"śäďŚ§ßť≠ö","ŤĶįś®ô"(maazazuah)Á≠ČśóŹÁĺ§Śā≥ÁĶĪśīĽŚčē.
S.PHON: == pa ¶aj ¶u *** == pa ¶aj- ¶u " paz…ôńß" siŇčaŇčan na ¶a tu pa ¶…ô-ńßaj ¶u atu paj ¶aj-ńßaj ¶u, ¶…ôndaj nipaŇčaŇčan u "sanmaw-ńßun", u tajwan taŇčabur~…ĺan nu jun ¶umin. mu…ôn…ôŇč i …ônar~…ĺan nu taj ¶un, mi ¶id…ôk ku i anr~…ĺi bansia ku satabakiaj. ¶…ôn ¶…ô a zidajan r~…ĺajak misatadas tu ¶uo tajwa sa, pa ¶aj- ¶u pa ¶i ¶i…ôn mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i miwr~…ĺi sanji r~…ĺiji-tan nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwan atu nantuo pur~…ĺi aajr~…ĺan nijadu Ē~ °an, pur~…ĺi katukuńß ajda mańßini ńß…ônaj ku kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ***(***:paz…ôńß) . mar~…ĺawp…ôstu ku kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji **** *** pa ¶aj-ji misuajaw tu sakar~…ĺawp…ôsan a kamuan, sadikudaj musakamuaj tu kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji a tad…ômaw itini i tus…ôp- ¶ajs…ôp a mińß ¶aan, nina mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶i pan- ¶in-ji tatajna, ńßatidaaj tu nu pa ¶aj- ¶uz…ôn mar~…ĺa r~…ĺajak tu namin, ¶asiw- ¶ajsiw a mińß ¶aan ni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, ju maudip ńß…ônaj napar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu " pa ¶aj-ji" a kamuan. tus…ôp-s…ôp ¶aj a mińß ¶aan namipadaŇč ¶i pan- ¶in-ji tu mikinkiwaj tu ¶udadan ¶i r~…ĺi-z…ôn-kuj juns…ô tu kamuan, atu dipun s…ôa ¶…ô ¶i s…ôt…ôn- ¶…ô misur~…ĺit tu " pa ¶aj-ji zidin", atu nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw ¶i wanpan-m…ôi-ji nisaŇčaan nu udip tu adidiaj nu zidin " ama Ē~ ° atu-nu a pa ¶ajn nakamuan. ". tus…ôp- ¶ajs…ôp mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad nantuo pa ¶aj bina ¶adan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan s…ôańßuj r~…ĺis…ô ¶…ôn ¶i pan-w…ôn-ńßui sakamusa, ajda nu pina a mińß ¶aan nu pa ¶aj-z…ôn itini i nipipadaŇč nu s…ôańßu, ajdaaj a wawa pasubabar~…ĺaki sabaw tu pina ku matin…ôŇčaj musakamu tu pa ¶aj-ji, ¶aj tu kaw babar~…ĺaki a ¶a ¶aj ku matin…ôŇčaj musakamu, sasa ajda inai Ē~ °tu ku sajawaj musakamuaj nu tad…ômaw. ajdaaj nu nantuo pur~…ĺi ajr~…ĺan kiwkaj tu pajduju nu sananar~…ĺ u kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji ku kamu nida. ****** . kur~…ĺitan ku bińßid ** ¶indaj ¶unńßua ¶…ô ¶um idaw kunipikir~…ĺukan tu " anr~…ĺi, saw ¶i, wuninr~…ĺan, ar~…ĺisi, pu ¶aj-r~…ĺi tatajna kur~…ĺit…ôn ku bir~…ĺbir~…ĺ, adidi Ē~ ° ku nipitur~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôkan, mańßida u r~…ĺuońßan- ¶…ôtuo, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ masasuajaw, i udip a ¶a nu dumaan kujda" nipi ¶uduńß misausi mańßida unipikur~…ĺit nu tar~…ĺuku a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. adińßan nu mita, k…ôńßa wu ¶u **:**** pa ¶aj bina ¶adan u tajwan taŇčbur~…ĺan nu j…ôn ¶umin, satabakiaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan nu wajwajan ńßan anu masakapańß tu kunuńß…ôni mitar~…ĺakw tu tajwan nandaw a j…ôn ¶imin, makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubuan a kunńßu. pa ¶aj a bina ¶adan idaw ńß…ônaj kunika k…ônińßan tu pa ¶aj- ¶u " pazińß" atu k…ôńßa-wu ¶u " ka*abu". u nijadu Ē~ ° ku ńßan, ńßunjun nutipan u pa ¶aj bina ¶adan, war~…ĺijan wus…ô u k…ôńßa-wu bina ¶adan. " pu ¶…ô-r~…ĺi bansia u k…ôńßa-wu ¶u". pa ¶aj- ¶u-z…ôn mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i pur~…ĺi, mu…ôn…ôŇč i wuniw-r~…ĺan masa…ônar~…ĺaj a kitidaan" ajr~…ĺan kitidaan" u pa ¶aj bina ¶adan, mu…ôn…ôŇč i m…ôsi sawa ¶an nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisa a m…ôsi-s…ô ¶un "niwmin-san, suo ¶…ôn-ńßu Ē~ °, tanan, wukun-r~…ĺun" u k…ôńßa-wu ¶u. ,***** ¶m (pazińß)******(ka*abu). . mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kina kamu nuńß…ôni atu masas…ôŇči ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, sakamusa ku jin…ôn- ¶ia ¶i anik…ônińßan u sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu bina ¶adan sa. maŇčar~…ĺaj mikajki ¶ tina k…ôńßa-wu ¶u atu pa ¶aj- ¶u a ŇčaŇčan, ¶i r~…ĺaj-kun-ji buksi maŇčar~…ĺaj tu abuan "abuan" , nina ŇčaŇčan sapar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn kina tusaaj a bina ¶adan. sadikudaj matin…ôŇčaj musakamu tu pa ¶aj-ji a tad…ômaw i tus…ôp- ¶ajs…ôp nina mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj a ajr~…ĺan nijaduan ¶i pan- ¶in-ji babar~…ĺaki, mi…ôsi-s…ô ¶un nina mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj ¶i pan- ¶un-naj babar~…ĺaki a ir~…ĺu ¶ ¶i pan-…ôun-r~…ĺi babar~…ĺaki atu duma a k…ôńßa-wu ¶…ônr~…ĺaw matin…ôŇč musakamu tu k…ôńßa-wuji, matin…ôŇč ńß…ônaj mudadiw tu naajawaj a k…ôńßa-wu a dadadiwan " ji ¶u- ¶…ôk…ô" "ajan, ajin". abuan "(ajan***). k…ôńßa-wu ¶u itini i pur~…ĺi ŇčaŇčan ńßan u " m…ôi-s…ô-s…ô ¶un-ńßun" tawjaaj a tad…ômaw midudu ¶ tu nadipaan nu babar~…ĺaki a kawawan. dipun a zitajan u ji-jun- ¶…ôn namin, masasuada tu bijawaj a taj-ja- ¶u masasud…ôm…ô ¶. sisa itini i pur~…ĺi mat…ôn…ôs kina kamuan tu " s…ô ¶un u tada ńßun sa". nina bina ¶adan pisiwga ¶uan paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " ńßuana pisiwg ¶uan" atu "siŇčaŇčanan tu pan a nipisiwga ¶u ńßan" kar~…ĺiwmaańß nu kujumi tu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw r~…ĺima nu d…ômiadan sikawaw. misaŇča tu dajdaj a kakan…ôn " ar~…ĺakuj", sikawaw tu " ¶…ôntin " mańßar~…ĺit", " dak…ôp tu tabakiaj a butiŇč", " ¶u…ôpiw "maazazuańß" tu dajdaja ¶a nu kawawan. "***",***"**"(mańßar~…ĺit),"***","**"(maazazuańß)*******.
